title: Israeli settlers target Palestinian villages in occupied West Bank, attacking people and properties
summary_full: The violence began after 18-year-old settler Yehuda Sherman was killed after reportedly being hit by a vehicle driven by a Palestinian while on his quad bike.
summary_public: The violence began after 18-year-old settler Yehuda Sherman was killed after reportedly being hit by a vehicle driven by a Palestinian while on his quad bike.

IL.label: negative
